required_evidence: independent point faults or validation rows where temporal persistence is absent
audit_rule: select mixture posterior when iid stuck-at labels are pointwise and the stuck-column model is compatible

semantic_trigger: persistent scalar stuck-at or flatline segments
required_evidence: contiguous scalar constant/flatline labels, native flatline windows, or straight-string labels
audit_rule: select HMM posterior when persistence is part of the label semantics and HMM is best within the compatible set

semantic_trigger: official flat-tolerance labels with scalar values preserved
required_evidence: public rows contain the scalar value and official flat-tolerance label in the same row
compatibility_set: PrivSAF-HMM; PrivSAF range-HMM; report frequency; channel GLR
selection_metric: case-mean AUPRC under frozen KRR-LDP protocol
audit_rule: select range-HMM when official flat-tolerance labels align with raw flatness and range-HMM leads private baselines

semantic_trigger: deployed field-QC stuck labels encoding local regime changes
required_evidence: validation rows show local channel statistic exceeds global stuck-column posterior
audit_rule: route to local channel statistic when the stuck label marks a local QC regime rather than one stuck bucket

required_evidence: row labels combine prepared stuck indicators rather than one scalar stuck bucket
compatibility_set: PM-window GLR; PM-column likelihood scan; PrivSAF-HMM
audit_rule: route to window statistic when row-level labels are not generated by a single scalar stuck bucket

required_evidence: missing/availability symbol is represented in the report alphabet
audit_rule: select dropout emission model when the observed state is availability rather than a scalar stuck value
